[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] forces '''raided''' the [[Space station/Legends|space station]] [[Yag-prime]] in the [[Yag'Dhul system/Legends|Yag'Dhul system]] to retake a large supply of [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] which had been seized by [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]].

==Background==
The stolen bacta was transported to [[Yag-prime]], an [[Empress-class space station|''Empress''-class space station]] orbiting [[Yag'Dhul/Legends|Yag'Dhul]]. The [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] was covertly informed of this by [[Qlaern Hirf]], an [[Ashern]] member who had been aboard one of the captured bacta freighters. Based on his information, the New Republic sent [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] and [[Defender Wing]] to eliminate the station's defenses, and a group of assault shuttles and freighters to seize the station and retrieve the bacta.

==The battle==
[[File:Yag_battle.jpg|thumb|left|200px]]

When the eleven [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] of Rogue Squadron and the twenty-four [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] of [[Champion Squadron|Champion]] and [[Warden Squadron]]s emerged from [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], four [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] were on patrol. [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] split off four of his X-wings to engage them, while the other fighters attacked the station to draw out its remaining eight TIE fighters and twelve [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE/IN interceptors]].

Shortly afterward, the [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wings]] of [[Guardian Squadron]] dropped out of hyperspace and made short work of the TIEs. Seven TIEs got hit with ion cannons, and another four of the TIE fighters surrendered, and their [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] pilots were taken aboard the ''[[Pulsar Skate]]'' to serve as an escort for the bacta convoy. Seventeen other freighters collected the bacta, and the convoy made its way to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].
